personal.name: Owolabi Oluwashijibomi Jeremiah
personal.title: Computer Scientist
personal.bio: I build serious systems — from AI-powered platforms to distributed cloud infrastructure. Currently studying Computer Science at Lead City University, where I explore the intersection of intelligent systems, scalable architectures, and network security.

about.headline: Engineering the Future, One System at a Time
paragraphs: I'm a Computer Science student at Lead City University with a deep passion for building systems that scale. My work spans AI infrastructure, cloud engineering, distributed computing, and cybersecurity.
I believe great software is not just functional — it's thoughtful, resilient, and built for the future. I design systems with first-principles thinking, always asking: what happens at 10x scale?
When I'm not coding, I'm researching distributed consensus algorithms, exploring AI infrastructure patterns, or diving into network security protocols.

projects.title: LECTURE-LINK
projects.subtitle: AI-Enhanced Departmental Learning Portal
projects.description: A full-stack AI-powered learning management system built for university departments. Features semantic search across all course materials, an intelligent AI chatbot for student queries, and a comprehensive analytics dashboard for educators.
projects.longDescription: LECTURE-LINK reimagines how universities manage and deliver educational content. Built with a microservices architecture, it handles thousands of concurrent users while providing personalized learning experiences powered by machine learning. The semantic search engine indexes lecture notes, past papers, and resources — returning contextually relevant results even for vague queries.

projects.title: Cloud Orchestrator
projects.subtitle: Multi-Cloud Infrastructure Management
projects.description: A unified dashboard for managing resources across AWS and Azure. Provides cost optimization recommendations, automated scaling policies, and infrastructure-as-code generation.
projects.longDescription: Designed to solve the complexity of multi-cloud deployments, this orchestrator unifies resource management, monitoring, and cost analysis across major cloud providers.

projects.title: DistKV
projects.subtitle: Distributed Key-Value Store
projects.description: A fault-tolerant distributed key-value store implementing the Raft consensus algorithm from scratch. Supports leader election, log replication, and cluster membership changes.
projects.longDescription: Built as a deep-dive into distributed systems theory, DistKV implements Raft consensus with a focus on correctness under network partitions and node failures.

projects.title: Neural IDS
projects.subtitle: AI-Powered Intrusion Detection System
projects.description: A machine learning-based network intrusion detection system trained on real attack patterns. Achieves 97% accuracy on the KDD99 dataset with real-time packet analysis.
projects.longDescription: Combining deep learning with network security, Neural IDS monitors traffic patterns and flags anomalies in real-time using a custom LSTM-based classifier.

projects.title: Apex Gateway
projects.subtitle: High-Performance API Gateway
projects.description: A custom API gateway built with Node.js supporting rate limiting, JWT auth, request transformation, and load balancing across microservices.
projects.longDescription: Apex Gateway handles 50k+ requests per second with sub-millisecond routing latency. Features a plugin architecture for extensibility.

projects.title: MLFlow Engine
projects.subtitle: Automated ML Training Pipeline
projects.description: An end-to-end machine learning pipeline for automated model training, evaluation, versioning, and deployment. Integrates with AWS SageMaker for distributed training.
projects.longDescription: Built to eliminate ML engineering boilerplate, this pipeline handles data ingestion, feature engineering, model training, A/B testing, and production deployment automatically.

experience.description: Assisted in maintaining enterprise IT infrastructure across production facilities. Handled hardware diagnostics, software deployment, and network troubleshooting in a high-throughput manufacturing environment.
highlights: Assisted in deploying enterprise software updates
Collaborated with senior engineers on network maintenance

experience.description: Provided first-line technical support for students and faculty. Managed lab systems, handled network issues, and maintained university computing resources.
highlights: Provided support for 500+ students and staff
Configured network equipment and managed VLANs
Automated lab maintenance with shell scripts

experience.description: Design and build web applications for clients ranging from startups to academic institutions. Specialize in performant backends, cloud deployments, and AI integrations.
highlights: Built and deployed cloud-hosted applications on AWS
Integrated AI/ML features into client products
Managed full project lifecycle from design to deployment

research.title: Cloud Computing

research.title: AI Infrastructure

research.title: ML Systems
research.description: Training pipelines, feature stores, real-time inference optimization.

research.title: Network Security

research.title: Internet Measurements
research.description: Network topology analysis, latency characterization, BGP routing behavior.

research.title: Concurrent Systems
research.description: Lock-free data structures, actor models, high-throughput concurrent programming.

research.title: Scalable Computing
research.description: Horizontal scaling patterns, sharding strategies, performance engineering.
